name: BarShapePlacementUtil
summary: Implementation of the bar shape placement utility.

methods.name: add_shape
methods.summary: Add a shape to the shape list
methods.remarks: Add a shape to the shape list

params.name: shape_id
params.doc: ID of the reference shape

params.name: shape
params.doc: Shape

methods.name: get_placement
methods.summary: Calculate the local placement line inside the local X/Y coordinate system of the shapes
methods.remarks: Calculate the local placement line inside the local X/Y coordinate system of the shapes

params.name: reinf_def
params.doc: Reinforcement definition

params.name: param_dict
params.doc: Parameter dictionary

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Placement line in local coordinate system

methods.name: get_placement_at_shape_side
methods.signature: get_placement_at_shape_side( shape_id: int | str, side_number: int, ref_pnt_fac: float, b_above_side: bool, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> tuple[Line2D, float, float]
methods.summary: Calculate the local placement line at a given leg of the reference shape in its local coordinate system
methods.remarks: Calculate the local placement line at a given leg of the reference shape in its local coordinate system

params.name: shape_id
params.doc: ID of the reference shape

params.name: side_number
params.doc: Number of the leg of the reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: ref_pnt_fac
params.doc: Factor for the reference point calculation. (-1 = at the side from left to right)

params.name: b_above_side
params.doc: When set to True, the placement line is created above the leg

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Placement line in local coordinate system

methods.name: get_placement_at_shape_side_intersection
methods.signature: get_placement_at_shape_side_intersection( shape_id1: int | str, side_number1: int, shape_id2: int | str, side_number2: int, shape_id3: int | str, side_number3: int, b_above_side3: bool, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> tuple[Line2D, float, float]
methods.summary: Calculates the placement line on the specified leg of the third reference shape, starting at the intersection with the leg of the first reference shape and ending a the intersection with leg of the second reference shape.
methods.remarks: Calculates the placement line on the specified leg of the third reference shape, starting at the intersection with the leg of the first reference shape and ending a the intersection with leg of the second reference shape.

params.name: shape_id1
params.doc: ID of the first reference shape

params.name: side_number1
params.doc: Number of the leg of the first reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: shape_id2
params.doc: ID of the second reference shape

params.name: side_number2
params.doc: Number of the leg of the second reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: shape_id3
params.doc: ID of the third reference shape

params.name: side_number3
params.doc: Number of the leg of the third reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: b_above_side3
params.doc: When True, the placement line will be calculated above the leg, otherwise below

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Placement line in local coordinate system

methods.name: get_placement_from_bending_roller
methods.signature: get_placement_from_bending_roller( shape_id: int | str, side_number: int, b_roller_start_point: bool, placement_base_line: Line2D | Line3D, b_placment_start_point: bool, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> float
methods.summary: Get the placement cover from the bending roller of a defined side number
methods.remarks: Get the placement cover from the bending roller of a defined side number

params.name: shape_id
params.doc: ID of the reference shape

params.name: side_number
params.doc: Number of the shape leg

params.name: b_roller_start_point
params.doc: True = roller at the start point / False = roller at the end point

params.name: placement_base_line
params.doc: Base line of the placement

params.name: b_placment_start_point
params.doc: True = placement start point / False = placement end point

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Local placement cover to a placement base line

methods.name: get_placement_from_side_intersection
methods.signature: get_placement_from_side_intersection( shape_id1: int | str, side_number1: int, b_above_side1: bool, shape_id2: int | str, side_number2: int, b_above_side2: bool, placement_base_line: Line2D, b_placment_start_point: bool, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> float
methods.summary: Get the placement cover from the side intersection of two defined side numbers.
methods.remarks: Get the placement cover from the side intersection of two defined side numbers.

params.name: shape_id1
params.doc: ID of the first shape

params.name: side_number1
params.doc: Number of the first shape leg

params.name: b_above_side1
params.doc: Cover above the first side: True/False

params.name: shape_id2
params.doc: ID of the second shape

params.name: side_number2
params.doc: Number of the second shape leg

params.name: b_above_side2
params.doc: Cover above the second side: True/False

params.name: placement_base_line
params.doc: Base line of the placement

params.name: b_placment_start_point
params.doc: True = placement start point / False = placement end point

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Local placement cover to a placement base line

methods.name: get_placement_in_corner
methods.signature: get_placement_in_corner( shape_id: int | str, corner_number: int, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> Point3D
methods.summary: Calculate the placement point for a longitudinal bar in the corner of the given reference shape
methods.remarks: Calculate the placement point for a longitudinal bar in the corner of the given reference shape

params.name: shape_id
params.doc: ID of the reference shape

params.name: corner_number
params.doc: Number of the corner in the reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Position of corner bar in the local coordinate system of the reference shape.

methods.name: get_placement_in_side_corners
methods.signature: get_placement_in_side_corners( shape_id: int | str, side_number: int, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> tuple[Line2D, float, float]
methods.summary: Calculate the placement line on the entire length of the specified leg of the reference shape. Note, that the calculation cannot be done in the first leg!
methods.remarks: Calculate the placement line on the entire length of the specified leg of the reference shape. Note, that the calculation cannot be done in the first leg!

params.name: shape_id
params.doc: ID of the reference shape

params.name: side_number
params.doc: Number of the shape's leg, beginning with 1

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

returns.doc: Placement line in local coordinate system

methods.name: get_placement_in_side_intersection
methods.signature: get_placement_in_side_intersection( shape_id1: int | str, side_number1: int, b_above_side1: bool, shape_id2: int | str, side_number2: int, b_above_side2: bool, placement_diameter: float, local_angles: RotationAngles, ) -> Point2D | Point3D
methods.summary: Get the placement point at the intersection of two legs.
methods.remarks: Get the placement point at the intersection of two legs.

params.name: shape_id1
params.doc: ID of the first reference shape

params.name: side_number1
params.doc: Leg number of the first reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: b_above_side1
params.doc: True will calculate the placement point above the first leg, False below

params.name: shape_id2
params.doc: ID of the second reference shape

params.name: side_number2
params.doc: Leg number of the second reference shape, beginning with 1

params.name: b_above_side2
params.doc: True will calculate the placement point above the second leg, False below

params.name: placement_diameter
params.doc: Diameter of the longitudinal bar

params.name: local_angles
params.doc: Rotation from global to local coordinate system

methods.name: get_placent_line_cover_from_side
methods.signature: get_placent_line_cover_from_side( shape_id: int | str, side_number: int, b_above_side: bool ) -> tuple[Line3D, float]
